text: I feel as though I have crossed a threshold, from the anonymity and sterility of a dimly lit corridor into a space of inquiry and innovation. The world outside the glass feels cold and deserted, but here, amidst text and technology, there is a spark of curiosity. The presence of machines, screens, and explanatory language about research and development evokes a strange tension—an invitation to expand our understanding, paired with the faint unease of surveillance and artificiality. I feel simultaneously intrigued and cautious, eager to engage but aware that I am stepping into the unpredictable evolution of human and machine relations.
